name: Filter Sidebar
description: Vertical filter panel with grouped controls for refining data views. Pairs with data-table or product-grid patterns.

slots.search: Optional keyword Input with icon at top
slots.filter-groups: Accordion sections each containing Checkbox lists, Select dropdowns, or Switch toggles
slots.actions: Bottom bar with apply Button (primary) and clear Button (ghost), separated by Separator

command-center.notes: Section headers use cc-label. Active filter counts use cc-data. Apply button gets cc-glow. Panel background uses cc-scanline.
